user_prompt: Some applications ask for visa status. Default to 'no sponsorship needed' since I'm a US citizen.
actual_output:
Acknowledged. I have updated your profile configuration.

### Updated Application Parameters

| Parameter | Setting |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Work Authorization** | US Citizen |
| **Sponsorship Requirement** | No sponsorship needed |
| **Application Logic** | Auto-select "No" for "Will you now or in the future require sponsorship?" |

This setting is now hard-coded into my application engine. I will ensure this is consistently applied across all ATS platforms (Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, etc.) to prevent any disqualification flags.

I am ready to execute the campaign. Shall I proceed with the overnight batch of 54 applications for the Senior Frontend Developer roles?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly accepted the user's instruction regarding visa status and confirmed how it would be implemented in the application process.
